info.DAtuviSezaH: prAyeRa ayam AN-pUrvakaH  kutracit pra-pUrvakaH api prayogaH dfSyate yaTA 'namovAkaM praSAsmahe' iti uttararAmacaritasya Adime Sloke
info.english_meaning: to desire to bless to praise
info.hindI_arTa: BalA karanA ASA karanA icCA karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ANpUrvatvaM prAyikam  tena ' namovAkaM praSAsmahe ' iti sidDam ' - sidDAntakOmudI

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'dIrGamAyurDanaM putrAn samyagArADitA SuBAH putrezvASAsate nityaM pitaro dEvatAni ca' (BA0 u0 13225-26) ASAsata icCanti kAmayante
'taM tvA vayaM viSvavArA''SAsmahe puruhUtaM' (f0 13010) ASAsmahe yAcAmahe
'ASizaSca praSizaSca saMSizo viSizaSca yAH' (aTarva0 111027) ASiza izwaPalaprArTanAni
'kaccidASAsti devAnAM prasAdaM pArTivAtmajaH' (rA0 53619) ASAsti ASAste prArTayate
